summary: This document provides a comparative analysis of Value-Based Care (VBC) and Fee-For-Service (FFS) models within the healthcare industry. It details the financial requirements, implementation costs, and payment structures associated with transitioning to outcome-based care, noting the role of technology in VBC success. The text highlights industry trends driven by CMS and private payers, emphasizing the economic incentives for quality and efficiency.
